name: Alex_ACT_Plugin_Mall
role: Plugin marketplace consumed by ACT heirs. Self-curating via weekly cron + auto-merge per ADR-008.
note: Do not bootstrap a heir into the Mall. Catalog refreshes run automatically via .github/workflows/scan-sources.yml (Mondays 11:00 UTC). Source registry edits via /add-source or /prune-source prompts; see .github/copilot-instructions.md § Duty Stack. Supervisor's role per ADR-008 is editorial oversight (Edition-promotion + cross-repo coherence), not operational curation.
